job_summary: A Decentralized Trial CRA manages clinical trials conducted using virtual, hybrid, or home- based models, reducing the need for physical site visits.
key_responsibilities: Oversee decentralized and hybrid clinical trials
Monitor patient data collected via wearable devices and apps
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice in virtual settings
Coordinate telemedicine visits and remote patient interactions
Ensure data privacy and digital consent processes
Support logistics like home sample collection
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
career_path: DCT CRA → Digital Trial Lead → Innovation Manager
skills_required: coordinate telemedicine visits and remote patient interactions
ensure data privacy and digital consent processes
monitor patient data collected via wearable devices and apps
oversee decentralized and hybrid clinical trials
support logistics like home sample collection
